Title: Bridging Intermediate- and High-Mass Star Formation with the MIRION Catalog of Yellowballs
Authors: Wolf-Chase G., Kerton C.R., Devine K., Larose N., Stapley M., Coleman M.,
Bassingthwaite E., Kassaye B., Rawat H., Jayasinghe T., Povich M.S 
Table: Mirion Catalog - Herschel-Matched Sources
================================================================================
Byte-by-byte Description of file: tab4.txt
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   Bytes  Format Units      Label   Explanation
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   1-  4  I4     ---          ID     Source identification number
   6-  9  F4.2   pc           DIAM   Diameter
  11- 14  F4.2   pc         e_DIAM   Uncertainty in diameter
  16- 23  F8.2   Msun         MASS   Mass
  25- 35  F11.2  Msun       e_MASS   Uncertainty in mass
  37- 46  F10.2  Lsun         BLUM   Bolometric luminosity
  48- 57  F10.2  Lsun       e_BLUM   Uncertainty in bolometric luminosity
  59- 64  F6.2   Lsun/Msun    LMRAT  Bolometric luminosity/mass ratio
  66- 74  F9.2   Lsun/Msun  e_LMRAT  Uncertainty in bolometric luminosity/mass ratio
  76- 80  F5.2   K            TEMP   Temperature from graybody fit
  82- 85  F4.2   K          e_TEMP   Uncertainty in temperature
  87- 94  F8.2   ---          LRAT   Luminosity ratio
  96- 102 F7.2   ---        e_LRAT   Uncertainty in luminosity ratio
 104- 109 F6.2   K            TBOL   Bolometric temperature
 111- 115 F5.2   K          e_TBOL   Uncertainty in bolometric temperature
 117- 121 F5.2   g/cm^2       SIGMA  Surface density
 123- 129 F7.2   g/cm^2     e_SIGMA  Uncertainty in surface density
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
